name: Leadtrend Technology Corporation
summary: Leadtrend Technology Corporation operates as an IC fables company primarily in Taiwan. It offers AC-DC controllers, such as primary side regulator controllers, isolated green mode products, isolated high voltage green mode products, synchronous rectification drivers, and transition mode PFC controllers; USB type-c port controllers; and LED application products, including 3 in 1 flexible dimming processors, AC/DC LED lighting controllers/drivers, current ripple suppressors, and CC/CV secondary side controllers. The company also provides TV/monitor, USB PD/PPS, networking, and LED lighting solutions. Its products are used in technical articles, networking, notebooks, monitors/TVs, chargers, and LED lightings. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.
